idea-plugin.name: Nightshade Theme
idea-plugin.description:
Nightshade Theme is a custom dark theme for JetBrains IDEs, inspired by the beauty of night and the elegance of shadows.

Features:

  • Sleek, modern dark interface with deep purples and subtle highlights that improves long-session comfort and reduces eye strain.
  • Optimized syntax highlighting for clearer code scanning and faster understanding.
  • Modern, clean aesthetic design that keeps your workspace focused and visually consistent.
  • Compatible with all JetBrains IntelliJ IDEs.
  • FREE: This plugin is free and always will be.

For more information, visit Nightshade Theme.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0
  • Initial release of Nightshade Theme with deep purple and elegant dark interface.
  • Added optimized syntax highlighting for improved code readability.
  • Designed for all JetBrains IntelliJ IDEs (2025.2+).
  • Added Marketplace-compliant description with clickable screenshot preview.
  • Optimized theme assets and created thumbnail preview for better preview experience.
  • Polished HTML markup for strict Marketplace compatibility.
  • Added comprehensive README with installation and feature documentation.
